mapper.sql: bm.id as menu_id, bm.code as menu_code, bm.name as menu_name, bm.level as menu_level, bm.seq as menu_seq
bm.id, bm.code, bm.name, bm.level, bm.seq, bm.parent_id
bm.id as bm_id, bm.code as bm_code, bm.name as bm_name, bm.level as bm_level, bm.seq as bm_seq, bm.parent_id as bm_parent_id
bm.id, bm.code, bm.name, bm.level, bm.seq, bm.parent_id, bm.icon_style, bm.icon_url, bm.route_url

bm.id as bm_id, bm.code as bm_code, bm.name as bm_name, bm.level as bm_level, bm.seq as bm_seq, bm.parent_id as bm_parent_id, bm.icon_style as bm_icon_style, bm.icon_url as bm_icon_url, bm.route_url as bm_route_url
mapper.select: select , , '0' as type, 0 as checked from `menu` bm inner join `system` bs on bm.system_id = bs.id and bs.deleted = 0 and bs.status = 1 and bs.hide_flag = 0 where bm.deleted = 0 and bm.status = 1 and bm.hide_flag = 0 order by bs.seq asc, bm.seq asc

select
,
, '0' as type , 1 as checked from `menu` bm inner join `system` bs on bm.system_id = bs.id and bs.deleted = 0 and bs.status = 1 and bs.hide_flag = 0 inner join role_menu brm on bm.id = brm.menu_id and brm.deleted = 0 inner join `role` br on brm.role_id = br.id and br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where bm.deleted = 0 and bm.status = 1 and bm.hide_flag = 0 and bo.id = #{orgId} and br.id = #{roleId} order by bs.seq asc, bm.seq asc

select
, 0 as checked from `menu` bm inner join `system` bs on bm.system_id = bs.id and bs.deleted = 0 and bs.status = 1 and bs.hide_flag = 0 where bm.deleted = 0
and bm.status = #{status}
and bs.id = #{systemId} order by bs.seq asc, bm.seq asc
mapper.sql:
select ,
from `menu` bm inner join `system` bs on bm.system_id = bs.id and bs.deleted = 0 and bs.status = 1 and bs.hide_flag = 0 inner join role_menu brm on bm.id = brm.menu_id and brm.deleted = 0 inner join `role` br on brm.role_id = br.id and br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join user_role bur on br.id = bur.role_id and bur.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on bur.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where bm.deleted = 0 and bm.status = 1 and bm.hide_flag = 0 and bo.id = #{orgId} and bu.id = #{userId} order by bs.seq asc, bm.seq asc

select ,
from `menu` bm inner join `system` bs on bm.system_id = bs.id and bs.deleted = 0 and bs.status = 1 and bs.hide_flag = 0 inner join role_menu brm on bm.id = brm.menu_id and brm.deleted = 0 inner join `role` br on brm.role_id = br.id and br.deleted = 0 and br.status = 1 inner join `org` bo on br.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 inner join user_group_role bugr on br.id = bugr.role_id and bugr.deleted = 0 inner join user_group bug on bugr.user_group_id = bug.id and bug.deleted = 0 and bug.status = 1 inner join user_group_user bugu on bug.id = bugu.user_group_id and bugu.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on bugu.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where bm.deleted = 0 and bm.status = 1 and bm.hide_flag = 0 and bo.id = #{orgId} and bu.id = #{userId} order by bs.seq asc, bm.seq asc
